title: DENTAL SERVICES - 211info
text: BRIGHT NOW DENTAL GRESHAM DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency dental care, orthodontics, general dental care, prosthodontics, implants, periodontics, and root canals. 443 NW Burnside Road Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm,Tuesday 9am-5pm, Friday 8am-4pm, Sunday 9am-2pm (503) 492-8487 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 492-8487 Toll-free (844) 400-7645 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service. Most major insurance plans accepted. Sliding-scale fees may be available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Nationwide SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm,Tuesday 9am-5pm, Friday 8am-4pm, Sunday 9am-2pm Services: Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Emergency Dental Care General Dentistry Orthodontics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
